dailyOutages.plant: A full interruption occurred at the Narshingdi and Bhulta substations (approximately 205 MW) from 07:30 hours
dailyOutages.reason: due to the tripping of the Haripur-Narshingdi 132 kV line, caused by a loop tearing in the switchyard of the Narshingdi Substation. Bhulta is now taking load following the switching of the Haripur-Bhulta 132 kV circuit. Narshingdi remains in full interruption.
dailyOutages.full_desc: A full interruption occurred at the Narshingdi and Bhulta substations (approximately 205 MW) from 07:30 hours due to the tripping of the Haripur-Narshingdi 132 kV line, caused by a loop tearing in the switchyard of the Narshingdi Substation. Bhulta is now taking load following the switching of the Haripur-Bhulta 132 kV circuit. Narshingdi remains in full interruption.
